title: Strengthen security posture using Microsoft Defender for Cloud and Microsoft Sentinel
summary: Strengthen security posture using Microsoft Defender for Cloud and Microsoft Sentinel

sections.title: Strengthen security posture using Microsoft Defender for Cloud and Microsoft Sentinel
sections.summary: Strengthen security posture using Microsoft Defender for Cloud and Microsoft Sentinel

lessons.title: Implement and manage enforcement of cloud governance policies
lessons.content_md:
This module equips administrators with the skills to design, deploy, and oversee security governance in Azure, ensuring alignment with organizational policies and industry best practices.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-manage-enforcement-cloud-governance-policies/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement and manage enforcement of cloud governance policies

lessons.title: Manage security posture by using Microsoft Defender for Cloud
lessons.content_md:
This module focuses on equipping administrators with the knowledge and skills needed to manage and enhance the security posture of their cloud environment using Microsoft Defender for Cloud, ensuring proactive identification and remediation of security risks.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/microsoft-defender-cloud-security-posture/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage security posture by using Microsoft Defender for Cloud

lessons.title: Configure and manage threat protection by using Microsoft Defender for Cloud
lessons.content_md:
This module focuses on the essential techniques for configuring and managing threat protection exclusively with Microsoft Defender for Cloud, empowering cybersecurity specialists to strengthen the security posture of their cloud environments.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/microsoft-defender-cloud-threat-protection/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure and manage threat protection by using Microsoft Defender for Cloud

lessons.title: Configure and manage security monitoring and automation solutions
lessons.content_md:
Learn to set up Azure Monitor and Microsoft Sentinel for automatic security monitoring and response in cloud settings.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/security-monitoring-automation-solutions/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure and manage security monitoring and automation solutions

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Strengthen security posture using Microsoft Defender for Cloud and Microsoft Sentinel
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Strengthen security posture using Microsoft Defender for Cloud and Microsoft Sentinel**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
